name: Twenty
description: Twenty CRM plugin for OpenClaw — manage people / companies / opportunities / notes / tasks, model custom objects + fields via the Metadata API, and build / modify / inspect dashboards (charts, tabs, widgets), all gated by workspace whitelist and approval prompts on destructive operations.

enabled.description: Master switch — disables all Twenty tools when false

apiKey.description: Twenty API key sent as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`. Supports ${ENV_VAR} substitution.

serverUrl.description: Twenty server base URL (no trailing slash). Supports ${ENV_VAR} substitution.

allowedWorkspaceIds.description: Whitelist of Twenty workspace UUIDs the plugin is allowed to operate on. Any tool call referencing a workspace outside this list is rejected before any HTTP request is made.

defaultWorkspaceId.description: Default Twenty workspace UUID injected when a tool does not explicitly provide one. Must be present in `allowedWorkspaceIds`. Supports ${ENV_VAR} substitution.

approvalRequired.description: Tool names that trigger an approval prompt via the `before_tool_call` hook before being executed. Defaults to every destructive operation.

readOnly.description: When true, blocks every write/delete operation at the plugin level regardless of approval state.

logLevel.description: Plugin log verbosity. `debug` includes request bodies (be mindful of PII).

allowedImportPaths.description: Whitelist of directories `twenty_bulk_import_csv` is allowed to read from. The supplied path is canonicalised (path.resolve) before the prefix check, so `../` traversal is blocked. An EXPLICIT empty array disables CSV import entirely.

enabled.label: Enable Twenty tools
enabled.help: Master switch — turn off to fully disable all twenty_* tools without uninstalling

apiKey.label: Twenty API Key
apiKey.help: Twenty REST API key. Sent as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.

serverUrl.label: Twenty Server URL
serverUrl.help: Base URL of the Twenty server (no trailing slash).

allowedWorkspaceIds.label: Allowed Workspace IDs
allowedWorkspaceIds.help: Whitelist of Twenty workspace UUIDs. The plugin refuses to call any workspace outside this list.

defaultWorkspaceId.label: Default Workspace ID
defaultWorkspaceId.help: Workspace UUID used when a tool does not specify one. Must appear in allowedWorkspaceIds.

approvalRequired.label: Tools requiring approval
approvalRequired.help: Tool names that trigger a `before_tool_call` approval prompt. Defaults cover every destructive operation.

readOnly.label: Read-only mode
readOnly.help: Block every write/delete at the plugin level. Useful for safe experimentation.

allowedImportPaths.label: Allowed CSV import paths
allowedImportPaths.help: Directories twenty_bulk_import_csv is allowed to read from. Paths are canonicalised before the check (defeats `../` traversal). Default: /home/node/.openclaw/ and /tmp/.
